import os
from transformers import AutoProcessor, AutoModelForVision2Seq
import torch

model_path = "/data/base_model/Qwen2.5-VL-3B-Instruct"
print("Loading processor...")
processor = AutoProcessor.from_pretrained(model_path, trust_remote_code=True)
print("Processor loaded. Tokenizer special tokens:")
tokenizer = processor.tokenizer
print("All special tokens:", tokenizer.all_special_tokens)
print("Special tokens map:", tokenizer.special_tokens_map)
print("Decoder start token:", tokenizer.decode_start_token)
print("Vocabulary size:", len(tokenizer))
# Check if '<box>' is a token
box_token_id = tokenizer.convert_tokens_to_ids("<box>")
print("<box> token id:", box_token_id)
box_start_id = tokenizer.convert_tokens_to_ids("<|box_start|>")
print("<|box_start|> token id:", box_start_id)
print("\nTesting chat template...")
# Check if processor has apply_chat_template
if hasattr(processor, 'apply_chat_template'):
    print("Processor has apply_chat_template")
else:
    print("Processor does NOT have apply_chat_template, using tokenizer.")
print("Tokenize simple text:")
msg = [{"role": "user", "content": [{"type": "text", "text": "Click the button"}]}]
text = processor.tokenizer.apply_chat_template(msg, tokenize=False)
print("Prompt:", text)
encoded = processor.tokenizer(text, return_tensors="pt")
print("Encoded input_ids shape:", encoded.input_ids.shape)
print("Tokens:", processor.tokenizer.convert_ids_to_tokens(encoded.input_ids[0][:50]))
